design_plan: rng=42; hero_lines=3; AIDA=checked; hero_centering=flex+text-align; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense; labels=competitors_swept; buttons_contrast=ink_on_paper
headline: Order food with AI — a personal agent that actually places the order

site_brief.audience: people who want an AI assistant to order meals, groceries, and delivery without babysitting apps
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Order food with AI', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful.
queries: computer use AI agent ordering food
site_brief.title: Order food with AI
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can coordinate food ordering across delivery apps, preferences, addresses, payment confirmation, and repeat orders

summary: This use‑case page shows how Super can help people order meals and groceries with an AI assistant that operates real delivery websites, remembers preferences, and speeds up repeat orders using a computer-use cache — without babysitting apps.
